MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF APR-20-2009 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON APR-20-2009 AT 2:30 PM IN DEPT. 503, ROBERT L. DONDERO FOR TERMS OF SETTLEMENT TO BE PLACED ON THE RECORD. (206)
REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF 350 BEACH STREET,LLC A CALIFORNIA LIABILITY CO COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-20-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206
MINUTES FOR APR-20-2009 2:30 PM FOR DEPT 503

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 350 BEACH STREET,LLC A CALIFORNIA LIABILITY CO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YAM, PATRICK INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA WHARF COFFEE SHOP THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 358 BEACH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94133 $49,451.20 RENT, $15,000.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $34,451.20, STAYED UNTIL APR-30-2009, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
